title: Luffy and Nami Are Taken Prisoner
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Pedro, Brook, Big Mom as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You were right... there's a second intruder!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the one you're dealing with right now is a mere decoy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see... that damned Pedro, going all out on us...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He took us by surprise, managed to get inside the trees- ure room, and has locked us out of the room!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: My bad, this was my mistake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But knowing that the treasure room only has a single entrance...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as you make sure to keep a sharp eye on that one entrance, there shouldn't be any problems with capturing the second intruder.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you're right. You can count on me for that! But if he defeats all the guards inside and gets outside...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I plan on killing him. Is that fine with you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: hold it. The man is "nothing but Bones" accord-ing to you, correct?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MAMA will definitely want to add him to her collection. Anything but killing is allowed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pedro's done a fine job... All my respect goes to the man!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even rarer than what you usually see around this country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I feel just the same way!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Mama will surely love this gift!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are soldiers controlled by souls that big mom inserted into their bodies using her ability.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In other words, you all are individuals that act based on what your soul tells you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold on, I'm not even done tuning yet-!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What I go by in the industry?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It only makes sense that souls merely cast into the wrong bodies like yours have not a chance of standing up...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: against the obstinate nature of my screaming soul!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 45 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
